positive: A minimalist, abstract forest scene suitable for apparel print. Focus on clean, stylized silhouettes of diverse foliage (leaves, ferns, stylized trees) arranged in a harmonious, repeating pattern. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and off-white. The composition should be highly centralized and balanced, emphasizing negative space for a clean, modern look. The style must resemble negative-space illustration combined with sophisticated woodblock printing aesthetics. High contrast, strong graphical elements, vector graphic quality, clean linework, print-ready resolution.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, low resolution, artifacts, grain, messy, ugly, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, smudge, grainy
